testsuite.name: EsgReportGenerator

testcase.name: generateAsync: repository failure during build → status FAILED
generateAsync: null metric sums renders N/A gracefully
generateAsync: with metric data populates detail sheets
generateAsync: Q4 range starts Oct 1 and ends Jan 1 next year
generateAsync: Q1 range starts Jan 1 and ends Mar 31
generateAsync: report not found → IllegalArgumentException propagates
generateAsync: creates XLSX file and marks report DONE

testsuite.system-out: 23:47:42.960 [Test worker] ERROR com.uip.backend.esg.service.EsgReportGenerator -- ESG report generation failed: reportId=10778bca-fb85-4413-9062-820bbacb66e6
